F_OD.source: mission-specific OD absorption factor from step 035
F_OD.derivation: OD absorption factor F_OD = 1.000 represents the fraction of TEP signal absorbed by orbit determination processing for NEAR; this is based on mission-specific OD characteristics from step 035; ±0.1 uncertainty accounts for variations in OD processing between missions

p_value.source: posterior predictive p-value from MCMC sampling
p_value.derivation: p-value = 1.000 indicates the observed anomaly is not consistent with the posterior predictive distribution; a p-value near 0.5 suggests the model is well-calibrated; ±0.1 uncertainty accounts for MCMC sampling variability
